enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
1.2 Short title and commencement a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India Master Directions on
Prepaid Payment Instruments, 2021 (MD-PPIs, 2021);
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India Master Directions on Prepaid Payment Instruments, 2021 (MD-PPIs, 2021)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: and b) These Directions shall come into effect from the date they are placed on RBI website.
enriched_requirements.object: the date they are placed on RBI website

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, in respect of instructions already issued, they shall be effective as per the respective timelines prescribed.
enriched_requirements.object: the respective timelines prescribed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 1.3 Applicability: The provisions of MD-PPIs shall apply to all Prepaid Payment Instrument (PPI) Issuers and System Participants.
enriched_requirements.object: Payment Instrument (PPI) Issuers and System Participants

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions

For the purpose of this MD, the following definitions shall be applicable:

2.1 Closed System PPIs : These PPIs are issued by an entity for facilitating the purchase of goods and services from that entity only and do not permit cash withdrawal.
definition of promoters for the purpose, shall be as defined in the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In respect of entities whose application for authorisation is returned for any reason by RBI, condition of Cooling Period shall be invoked after giving the entity an additional opportunity to submit the application.
enriched_requirements.object: the entity an additional opportunity to submit the application

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: During the Cooling Period, entities shall be prohibited from submission of applications for operating any payment system under the PSS Act.
enriched_requirements.object: of applications for operating any payment system under the PSS Act

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 2.5 Limits : All limits in the value of instruments stated in this MD, indicate the maximum value of such instruments denominated in INR that shall be issued.

2.7 Net-worth : Shall consist of 'paid up equity capital, preference shares which are compulsorily convertible into equity capital, free reserves, balance in share premium account and capital reserves representing surplus arising out of sale proceeds of assets but not reserves created by revaluation of assets' adjusted for 'accumulated loss balance, book value of intangible assets and deferred revenue expenditure, if any'.
enriched_requirements.object: equity capital, preference shares which are compulsorily convertible into equity capital, free reserves, balance in share premium account and capital reserves representing surplus arising out of sale proceeds of assets but not reserves created by revaluation of assets' adjusted for 'accumulated loss balance, book value of intangible assets and deferred revenue expenditure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: While compulsorily convertible preference shares reckoned for computation of net-worth can be either non- cumulative or cumulative, these shall be compulsorily convertible into equity shares and the shareholder agreements shall specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share capital at any time.
enriched_requirements.object: equity shares and the shareholder agreements shall specifically prohibit any withdrawal of this preference share capi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: They shall be used only for purchase of goods and services.
enriched_requirements.object: purchase of goods and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Funds transfer or cash withdrawal from such PPIs shall not be permitted.
Banks issuing such PPIs shall also facilitate cash withdrawal at ATMs / Points of Sale (PoS) devices / Business Correspondents (BCs).
enriched_requirements.object: at ATMs / Points of Sale (PoS) devices / Business Correspondents (BCs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These PPIs shall be used for purchase of goods and services, funds transfer or cash withdrawal.
enriched_requirements.object: of goods and services, funds transfer or cash withdrawal

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility requirements for issuance of PPIs by banks

3.1 Banks that comply with the eligibility criteria, including those stipulated by the respective regulatory department of RBI, shall be permitted to issue PPIs after obtaining approval from RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: PPIs after obtaining approval from RBI

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 30 days of obtaining such clearance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks, seeking approval from the RBI under the PSS Act, shall apply to the Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), Central Office (CO), RBI, Mumbai along with a 'No Objection Certificate' from their regulatory department, within 30 days of obtaining such clearance.
enriched_requirements.object: of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), Central Office (CO), RBI, Mumbai along with a 'No Objection Certificate' from their

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Capital and other eligibility requirements for issuance of PPIs by non-banks


4.1 Non-banks that comply with the eligibility criteria, including those stipulated by the respective regulatory department of RBI, shall be permitted to issue PPIs after obtaining authorisation from RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: PPIs after obtaining authorisation from RBI

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 30 days of obtaining such clearance
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Non-banks, regulated by any of the financial sector regulators, seeking authorisation from the RBI under the PSS Act shall apply to the DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai along with a 'No Objection Certificate' from their respective regulator, within 30 days of obtaining such clearance.
enriched_requirements.object: CO, RBI, Mumbai along with a 'No Objection Certificate' from their respective regulator, within 30 days of obtaining such clearance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.2 Non-bank entities applying for authorisation shall be a company incorporated in India and registered under the Companies Act, 1956 / 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: in India and registered under the Companies Act, 1956 / 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.3 Non-bank entities having Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) / Foreign Portfolio Investment (FPI) / Foreign Institutional Investment (FII) shall also meet the capital requirements as applicable under the extant Consolidated FDI policy guidelines of Government of India.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements as applicable under the extant Consolidated FDI policy guidelines of Government of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.4 The Memorandum of Association (MoA) of the non-bank entity shall cover the proposed activity of PPI issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: of PPI issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.5 All non-bank entities seeking authorisation from RBI under the PSS Act shall have a minimum positive net-worth of Rs.5 crore as per the latest audited balance sheet at the time of submitting the application.
enriched_requirements.object: net-worth of Rs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: They shall submit a certificate in the enclosed format (Annex-2) from their Chartered Accountants (CA) to evidence compliance with the applicable net-worth requirement while submitting the application for authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: the enclosed format (Annex-2) from their Chartered Accountants (CA) to evidence compliance with the applicable net-worth requi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The application shall be processed by RBI based on this net-worth which shall be maintained at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: based on this net-worth which shall be maintained at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Thereafter, by the end of the third financial year from the date of receiving final authorisation, they shall achieve a minimum positive net-worth of Rs.15 crore which shall be maintained at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: net-worth of Rs

conditions: if the entity is issued final authorisation on March 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Illustratively, if the entity is issued final authorisation on March 1, 2021, then it shall achieve a minimum positive net-worth of Rs.15 crore for the financial position as on March 31, 2023.
enriched_requirements.object: net-worth of Rs

conditions: if the entity is issued final authorisation on May 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Similarly, if the entity is issued final authorisation on May 1, 2021, then it shall achieve a minimum positive net-worth of Rs.15 crore for the financial position as on March 31, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: net-worth of Rs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.6 Non-bank PPI issuer (authorised till October 11, 2017) shall comply with the minimum positive net-worth requirement of Rs.15 crore for the financial position as on September 30, 2021 (provisional balance sheet).
enriched_requirements.object: positive net-worth requirement of Rs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This shall be reported to RBI, along with CA certificate in the enclosed format (Annex-2) and provisional balance sheet, by October 31, 2021 failing which they may not be permitted to carry out this business.
enriched_requirements.object: along with CA certificate in the enclosed format (Annex-2) and provisional balance sheet, by October 31, 2021 failing which they m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Thereafter, the minimum positive net-worth of Rs.15 crore shall be maintained at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Till September 30, 2021, the existing PPI issuer shall continue to maintain the capital requirements applicable to it at the time of its authorisation.
enriched_requirements.object: capital requirements applicable to it at the time of its authorisation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.7 Authorised non-bank PPI issuer shall submit a net-worth certificate every year in the enclosed format (Annex-2) to evidence compliance with the applicable net-worth requirement as per the audited balance sheet of the financial year within six months of completion of that financial year.
enriched_requirements.object: every year in the enclosed format (Annex-2) to evidence compliance with the applicable net-worth requirement as per the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.8 Newly incorporated non-bank entities that may not have an audited statement of financial accounts shall submit a certificate in the enclosed format (Annex-2) from their CA regarding the current net-worth along with provisional balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: the enclosed format (Annex-2) from their CA regarding the current net-worth along with provisional balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 4.9 Non-bank PPI issuer shall also be guided by DPSS circular CO.DPSS.AUTH.No.S190/02.27.005/2021-22 dated June 14, 2021 (as amended from time to time) on Investment in entities from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions.
enriched_requirements.object: DPSS circular CO

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Authorisation process for non-banks

5.1 A non-bank entity desirous of issuing PPIs shall apply for authorisation in Form A (available on RBI website www.rbi.org.in) as prescribed under Regulation 3(2) of the Payment and Settlement Systems Regulations, 2008 (PSS Regulations) along with the requisite application fees.
enriched_requirements.object: Form A (available on RBI website www

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.2 The application shall initially be screened by RBI to ensure prima facie eligibility of the applicant.
enriched_requirements.object: RBI to ensure prima facie eligibility of the applicant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The directors of the applicant entity shall submit a declaration in the enclosed format (Annex-3).
enriched_requirements.object: the enclosed format (Annex-3)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: RBI shall also check 'fit and proper' status of the applicant.
enriched_requirements.object: proper' status of the applicant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Application of entities not meeting the eligibility criteria, or those that are incomplete / not in the prescribed form with all details, shall be returned without refund of the application fees.
enriched_requirements.object: of the application fees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.3 In addition to the compliance with the applicable guidelines, RBI shall also apply checks, inter-alia, on certain essential aspects like customer service and efficiency, technical and other related requirements, safety and security aspects, etc., before granting in-principle approval to the applicants.
enriched_requirements.object: on certain essential aspects like customer service and efficiency, technical and other related requirements, safety and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.4 Subject to meeting the eligibility criteria and other conditions, the RBI shall issue an 'in- principle' approval, which shall be valid for a period of six months.
enriched_requirements.object: approval, which shall be valid for a period of six months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The entity shall submit a satisfactory System Audit Report (SAR) to RBI within these six months, failing which the in- principle approval shall lapse automatically.
enriched_requirements.object: Audit Report (SAR) to RBI within these six months, failing which the in- principle approval shall lapse automatically

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: SAR shall be accompanied by a certificate from the CA regarding compliance with the minimum positive net-worth.
enriched_requirements.object: certificate from the CA regarding compliance with the minimum positive net-worth

conditions: if any adverse features regarding the entity / promoters / group or business practices
if warranted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.5 Subsequent to the issue of the in-principle approval, if any adverse features regarding the entity / promoters / group or business practices, etc., come to notice, RBI may impose additional conditions and if warranted, the in-principle approval may be withdrawn.
enriched_requirements.object: if warranted, the in-principle approval may be withdrawn

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.6 Pursuant to receipt of satisfactory SAR, net-worth certificate and due diligence, RBI shall grant final Certificate of Authorisation (CoA).
enriched_requirements.object: Authorisation (CoA)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Entities granted final authorisation shall commence business within six months from the grant of CoA failing which the authorisation shall lapse automatically.
enriched_requirements.object: months from the grant of CoA failing which the authorisation shall lapse automatically

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.7 CoA shall be granted to all PSOs on a perpetual basis subject to the conditions stated in DPSS circular DPSS.CO.AD.No.724/02.27.005/2020-21 dated December 4, 2020 (as amended from time to time).
enriched_requirements.object: PSOs on a perpetual basis subject to the conditions stated in DPSS circular DPSS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.8 Entities seeking renewal of authorisation shall apply in writing to DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai at least three months before the expiry of validity of CoA, failing which RBI reserves the right to decline the request for renewal.
enriched_requirements.object: DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai at least three months before the expiry of validity of CoA, failing which RBI reserves the right to decline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.9 Any proposed major change, such as changes in product features / process, structure or operation of the payment system, etc., shall be communicated with complete details to the Chief General Manager (CGM), DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai.
enriched_requirements.object: details to the Chief General Manager (CGM), DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai

enriched_requirements.timeline: within 15 working days after receipt of above communication at DPSS
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: RBI shall endeavour to reply within 15 working days after receipt of above communication at DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai.
enriched_requirements.object: 15 working days after receipt of above communication at DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 5.10 Any takeover or acquisition of control or change in management of a non-bank entity shall be communicated to the CGM, DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai within 15 days with complete details, including 'Declaration and Undertaking' (Annex-3) by each of the new directors, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: CGM, DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai within 15 days with complete details, including 'Declaration and Undertaking' (Annex-3) by each of the new directors

conditions: if required
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: RBI shall examine the 'fit and proper' status of the management and, if required, may place suitable restrictions on such changes.
enriched_requirements.object: proper' status of the management and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Safeguards against money laundering provisions

6.1 The Know Your Customer (KYC) / Anti-Money Laundering (AML) / Combating Financing of Terrorism (CFT) guidelines issued by the Department of Regulation (DoR), RBI, in "Master Direction - Know Your Customer Direction, 2016", as updated from time to time, shall apply mutatis mutandis to all the entities issuing PPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: all the entities issuing PPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 6.2 Provisions of Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 (PMLA) and Rules framed thereunder, as amended from time to time, shall be applicable to PPI issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 6.3 PPI issuer shall maintain a log of all the transactions undertaken using the PPIs for at least ten years.
enriched_requirements.object: all the transactions undertaken using the PPIs for at least ten years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: This data shall be made available for scrutiny to RBI or any other agency / agencies as may be advised by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: scrutiny to RBI or any other agency / agencies as may be advised by RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The PPI issuer shall also file Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) to Financial Intelligence Unit-India (FIU-IND).
enriched_requirements.object: Reports (STRs) to Financial Intelligence Unit-India (FIU-IND)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.2 PPI issuer shall have a clear laid down policy, duly approved by its Board, for issuance of various types / categories of PPIs and all activities related thereto.
enriched_requirements.object: down policy, duly approved by its Board, for issuance of various types / categories of PPIs and all activities related thereto

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.3 PPI issuer shall ensure that the name of the company which has received approval / authorisation for issuance and operating of PPIs, is prominently displayed along with the PPI brand name in all instances.
enriched_requirements.object: of the company which has received approval / authorisation for issuance and operating of PPIs, is prominently displayed along wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: PPI issuer shall also keep RBI informed regarding the brand names employed / to be employed for its products.
enriched_requirements.object: regarding the brand names employed / to be employed for its products

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.4 PPI issuer shall not pay any interest on PPI balances.
enriched_requirements.object: PPI balances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.5 PPIs shall be permitted to be loaded / reloaded by cash, debit to a bank account, credit and debit cards, PPIs (as permitted from time to time) and other payment instruments issued by regulated entities in India and shall be in INR only.
enriched_requirements.object: loaded / reloaded by cash, debit to a bank account, credit and debit cards, PPIs (as permitted from time to time) and other payment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.6 Cash loading to PPIs shall be limited to Rs.50,000/- per month subject to overall limit of the PPI.
7.7 PPIs may be issued as cards, wallets, and in any such form / instrument which can be used to access the PPI and to use the amount therein.
enriched_requirements.object: wallets, and in any such form / instrument which can be used to access the PPI and to use the amount therein

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: No PPI shall be issued in the form of paper vouchers.
enriched_requirements.object: form of paper vouchers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.8 Banks shall be permitted to load / reload PPIs through BCs subject to compliance with BC guidelines issued by RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: / reload PPIs through BCs subject to compliance with BC guidelines issued by RBI
/ reload PPIs through their authorised outlets or through their authorised / designated agents subject to following conditions:-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.10 PPI issuer shall ensure that there is no co-mingling of funds originating from any other activity that they may be undertaking such as BC of bank/s, intermediary for payment aggregation, payment gateway, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: no co-mingling of funds originating from any other activity that they may be undertaking such as BC of bank/s, intermediary for p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.11 PPIs under co-branding arrangements a) The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the PPI
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: Board approved policy of the PPI issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to the various risks associated with such an arrangement including reputation risk and the PPI issuer shall put in place suitable risk mitigation measures.
enriched_requirements.object: to the various risks associated with such an arrangement including reputation risk and the PPI issuer shall put

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall also clearly lay down the roles, responsibilities and obligations of each co-branding partner.
enriched_requirements.object: the roles, responsibilities and obligations of each co-branding partner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) The co-branding partner shall be a company incorporated in India under the
Companies Act, 1956 / 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: in India under the Companies Act, 1956 / 2013

conditions: In case the co-branding partner is a bank
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case the co-branding partner is a bank, the same shall be licensed by RBI.

c) PPI issuer shall carry out due diligence of the co-branding partner to protect
themselves against the reputation risk.
enriched_requirements.object: of the co-branding partner to protect themselves against the reputation risk

conditions: In case of tie up with a financial entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: In case of tie up with a financial entity, it may ensure that approval of co-branding partner's regulator for entering into such arrangement is available.
enriched_requirements.object: co-branding partner's regulator for entering into such arrangement is available

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
d) Instructions / Guidelines on KYC / AML / CFT (as indicated in paragraph 6) shall be
adhered to in respect of all PPIs issued under the co-branding arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of all PPIs issued under the co-branding arrangement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: e) PPI issuer shall be liable for all acts of the co-branding partner.
enriched_requirements.object: acts of the co-branding partner

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issuer shall also
be responsible for all customer-related aspects of the PPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: all customer-related aspects of the PPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
f) PPI issuer shall be permitted to co-brand such instruments with the name / logo of
the company for whose customers / beneficiaries such co-branded instruments are to be issued.
enriched_requirements.object: such instruments with the name / logo of the company for whose customers / beneficiaries such co-branded instruments are to b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: g) The name of PPI issuer shall be prominently visible on the payment instrument.
enriched_requirements.object: the payment instrument

conditions: In case of non-bank PPI issuer

where co-branding arrangement takes place
between two non-bank PPI issuers
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
h) In case of non-bank PPI issuer, where co-branding arrangement takes place
between two non-bank PPI issuers, the agreement shall clearly indicate which partner is the PPI issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: is the PPI issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
i) Non-bank PPI issuer desirous of issuing co-branded PPIs shall seek one time
approval from DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai.
enriched_requirements.object: from DPSS, CO, RBI, Mumbai

conditions: In case of co-branding arrangements between a bank and non-bank entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
j) In case of co-branding arrangements between a bank and non-bank entity, the bank
shall be the PPI issuer.

Role of the non-bank entity shall be limited to marketing /
distribution of the PPIs or providing access to the PPI holder to services that are offered.
enriched_requirements.object: / distribution of the PPIs or providing access to the PPI holder to services that are offered

conditions: In case of co-branding arrangement between two banks
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
k) In case of co-branding arrangement between two banks, the PPI issuing bank shall
ensure compliance to above instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
l) Bank PPI issuer shall also adhere to instructions contained in circular
DBR.No.FSD.BC.18/24.01.009/2015-16 dated July 1, 2015, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in circular DBR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 7.12 There shall be no remittance without compliance to KYC requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: compliance to KYC requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The PPI issuer, including its agent/s, shall not create new PPIs every time for facilitating cash-based remittances to other PPIs / bank accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: time for facilitating cash-based remittances to other PPIs / bank accounts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: PPIs created for previous remittance by the same person shall be used.

Cross-border transactions

The use of INR denominated PPIs for cross-border transactions shall not be permitted except as under:

8.1 PPIs for cross-border outward transactions a) Full-KYC PPIs issued by banks having AD-I licence shall be permitted to be used in
cross-border outward transactions (only for permissible current account transactions under FEMA viz.
enriched_requirements.object: under: 8

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) PPIs shall not be used for any cross-border outward fund transfer and / or for making
payments under Liberalised Remittances Scheme (LRS).
enriched_requirements.object: cross-border outward fund transfer and / or for making payments under Liberalised Remittances Scheme (LRS)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Prefunding of online merchant's account shall not be permitted using such Rupee denominated PPIs;
enriched_requirements.object: Rupee denominated PPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) PPI issuer shall enable the facility of cross-border outward transactions only on
explicit request of the PPI holders and shall apply a per transaction limit not exceeding Rs.10,000/-, while per month limit shall not exceed Rs.50,000/- for such cross-border transactions;

conditions: In case such PPIs are issued in card form
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
d) In case such PPIs are issued in card form, it shall be ensured that they are EMV Chip
and PIN compliant;
enriched_requirements.object: are EMV Chip and PIN compliant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: and e) Such PPIs may not be issued as a separate category of PPI.
enriched_requirements.object: separate category of PPI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.2 PPIs for credit towards cross-border inward remittances a) Bank and non-bank PPI issuer, appointed as Indian agent of authorised overseas
principals, shall be permitted to issue full-KYC PPIs to beneficiaries of inward remittances under the Money Transfer Services Scheme (MTSS) of RBI;
enriched_requirements.object: full-KYC PPIs to beneficiaries of inward remittances under the Money Transfer Services Scheme (MTSS) of RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) Such PPIs shall be issued in adherence to extant norms under the MTSS Guidelines
issued by Foreign Exchange Department (FED), RBI;
enriched_requirements.object: to extant norms under the MTSS Guidelines issued by Foreign Exchange Department (FED), RBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
c) Amounts only upto Rs.50,000/- from individual inward MTSS remittances shall be
permitted to be loaded / reloaded in full-KYC PPIs issued to beneficiaries.
enriched_requirements.object: loaded / reloaded in full-KYC PPIs issued to beneficiaries

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Amount in excess of Rs.50,000/- shall be paid by credit to a bank account of the beneficiary.
enriched_requirements.object: to a bank account of the beneficiary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Full details of the transactions shall be maintained on record for scrutiny;
enriched_requirements.object: for scrutiny

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
d) Roles and responsibilities of PPI issuer shall be distinct from roles and
responsibilities as Indian Agents under MTSS;
enriched_requirements.object: and responsibilities as Indian Agents under MTSS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 8.3 Foreign Exchange PPIs: Entities authorised under FEMA to issue foreign exchange denominated PPIs shall be outside the purview of this MD.
enriched_requirements.object: of this MD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Types of PPIs

9.1 Small PPIs (or Minimum-detail PPIs)

(i) PPIs upto Rs.10,000/- (with cash loading facility)
a) Bank and non-banks shall be permitted to issue such PPIs after obtaining minimum
details of the PPI holder;
enriched_requirements.object: such PPIs after obtaining minimum details of the PPI holder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
b) Minimum details shall necessarily include a mobile number verified with One Time
Password (OTP) and a self-declaration of name and unique identity / identification number of any 'mandatory document' or 'Officially Valid Document (OVD)' or any such document with any name listed for this purpose in the Master Direction on KYC, as amended from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: number verified with One Time Password (OTP) and a self-declaration of name and unique identity / identification number o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: c) Such PPIs shall be reloadable in nature;

d) Amount loaded in such PPIs during any month shall not exceed Rs.10,000/- and the
total amount loaded during the financial year shall not exceed Rs.1,20,000/-;
e) Amount outstanding at any point of time in such PPIs shall not exceed Rs.10,000/-;
f) Total amount debited from such PPIs during any month shall not exceed Rs.10,000/;
g) These PPIs shall be used only for purchase of goods and services.
enriched_requirements.object: purchase of goods and services

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cash withdrawal
or funds transfer from such PPIs shall not be permitted;
h) There shall be no separate limit for purchase of goods and services using PPIs;
enriched_requirements.object: for purchase of goods and services using PPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PPI
issuer may decide limit for these purposes within the overall PPI limit;
enriched_requirements.object: purposes within the overall PPI limit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
i) These PPIs shall be converted into full-KYC PPIs (as defined in paragraph 9.2) within
a period of 24 months from the date of issue of the PPI, failing which no further credit shall be allowed in such PPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: PPIs (as defined in paragraph 9

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: However, the PPI holder shall be allowed to use the balance available in the PPI;
enriched_requirements.object: the balance available in the PPI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
j) This category of PPI shall not be issued to the same user in future using the same
mobile number and same minimum details;
enriched_requirements.object: same user in future using the same mobile number and same minimum details

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: k) PPI issuer shall give an option to close the PPI at any time.
